title: OhioCraft Pack
description: Light adventure modpack made in Ohio
body:
PT-BR:
Um Modpack do Minecraft Fabric 1.19.2 com todos os melhores mods de aventura, construção e optimização, causando um mini-modpack que roda no PC de Miguel (batata).

EN-US:

A lite FABRIC 1.19.2 mini-modpack, containing adventure mods like Better End, Deeper and Darker and Dehydration but containing also the best performance mods, to run even on a potato.

Modlist:

Exploration:
- Better End
- Friends and Foes
- Fabric Waystones
- Arcanus Legacy
- Deeper and Darker
 - Biomes Makeover
- Rotten Creatures
	
Survival:
 - Origins
 - EnvinronmentZ
 - Dehydration
 - Scout
 - Colytra
 - Disenchanter
	
Building/Inventory:
- Effortless Building (May be considered a cheat)
- Decorative Blocks
- Enchantment Description
	
Performance/Dependences:
- Architecture
- Geckolib3
- Bookshelf16
- Fabric API (na versão 0.72 ou mais)
- BCLib
- AdvancementInfo
- Animatica
- AntiGhost
- Better Mount HUD
- Borderless Mining
- CIT Resewn
- Colormatic
- Continuity
- Cull Less Leaves
- Custom Entity Models (CEM)
- Debugify
- Dynamic FPS
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling Fabric/Forge
- Entity Texture Features - [Fabric & Forge]
- Fabric API
- Fabric Capes
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FabricSkyboxes
- FabricSkyBoxes Interop
- Fabrishot
- Farsight [Fabric]
- FerriteCore (Fabric)
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Item Model Fix (Fabric)
- LambdaBetterGrass
- LambDynamicLights
- Language Reload
- LazyDFU
- Lithium (Fabric)
- Main Menu Credits
- MemoryLeakFix
- MidnightControls
- Mixin Conflict Helper
- MixinTrace
- Mod Menu
- More Chat History
- No Chat Reports
- No Fade
- OptiGUI
- Puzzle
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Smooth Boot (Fabric)
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Starlight (Fabric)
- Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)
- Zoomify

You may think that 70 mods is a lot, but, from those mods, only 16 are mods that change gameplay, the rest being all to optimize the modpack.
